positive: A majestic celestial wildlife scene, featuring a pair of stylized, ethereal owls perched on a crystalline branch, silhouetted against a deep nebula sky. The sky is rendered in rich gradients of teal, deep violet, and midnight blue, streaked with faint, cosmic gold dust. The owls have large, expressive eyes glowing with soft luminescence. Composition must be centered and perfectly symmetrical. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau meets bioluminescent fantasy, highly detailed line work, clean vector aesthetic suitable for embroidery or screen printing. Lighting: Strong rim lighting emphasizing the owl's edges and the crystal's facets. Mood: Mysterious, serene, and awe-inspiring. Graphic design, high contrast, perfect repetition for apparel printing, clean silhouette.
negative: artifacts, grainy, noisy, blurry, lowres, text, watermark, signature, logo, bad anatomy, extra limbs, fused fingers, amateur, poor quality, dirty, muted colors, photorealistic, cartoon, messy background
